subject: [PATCH v3 01/20] iomap: split iomap_iter() logic into iomap_iter_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch splits the iomap_iter() logic into a new helper function, iomap_iter_next(). The purpose of this change is to prepare for an upcoming modification that will use an in-iter model, where the ->iomap_next() callback can directly call iomap_iter_next(). The patch adds an inlined helper function and provides macros to generate boilerplate code for ->iomap_next() wrappers. No functional changes are intended, but there is a minor difference on the error path of iomap_end(), which now zeroes iter.status instead of leaving it as the caller's last value.
